role: profiling driver; cross-engine numbers come from bench/run_bench.py only (bench/FAIRNESS.md client-path rule)

warmup.note: one unmeasured warmup request; excluded from metrics, included in stats

output_tok_s_definition: sum_i n_i / (max_i t_i,last - min_i t_i,submit) — total new tokens over the full wall window, which includes all prefill work (docs/DESIGN.md section 13)
